tpl_amount.value: EUR 100,000,000 personal injury (max EUR 12,000,000 per person); property damage included
tpl_amount.source_text: Haftpflichtversicherung mit einer maximalen Deckungssumme bei Personen- und Sachschden in Hhe von EUR 100 Mio.

grace_period_minutes.source_text: muss bei Abholung eine Kredit- oder Debitkarte vorgelegt werden.

licence_rules.value: EU/EEA licence required. Original licence only — photocopies and digital licences not accepted. Non-German licences require certified translation.
licence_rules.source_text: Die gltige Fahrerlaubnis ist durch die Vorlage des originalen Fhrerscheins nachzuweisen.

payment_rules.value: Credit and debit cards accepted: Visa, MasterCard, Amex, Diners Club, Discover, JCB, China UnionPay. Prepaid cards not accepted. Cash not accepted.
payment_rules.source_text: Sixt akzeptiert Kredit- und Debit-Karten sowie Digital Wallets von Visa, MasterCard, American Express, Diners Club, Discover, JCB.

cross_border_conditions.value: 4-zone system. Zone I (Western Europe): all vehicles permitted. Zone IV (outside Zones I-III): prohibited for all vehicles.
cross_border_conditions.source_text: Die Fahrzeugwahl kann die Einreise in bestimmte Lnder beschrnken.

api_metadata.data_disclaimer: T&C data is AI-extracted from supplier documents. Verify critical information with the supplier directly.

validation.note: Validation against annotation_base.json — keyword matching on extracted values.

tpl_amount.annotation_note: Explicit supplier figure — COB lookup not required. Max €12M per person.

grace_period_minutes.ai_source_text: muss bei Abholung eine Kredit- oder Debitkarte vorgelegt werden.
grace_period_minutes.annotation_note: Sourced from Sixt DE help center /anfahrt-und-ankunft/. With flight number: up to 24 hours guaranteed. Airport stations stay open 1 hour after closing for delayed flights.

licence_rules.ai_value: EU/EEA licence required. Original licence only — photocopies and digital licences not accepted. Non-German licences requ
licence_rules.ai_source_text: Die gltige Fahrerlaubnis ist durch die Vorlage des originalen Fhrerscheins nachzuweisen.
licence_rules.expected_value: EU/EEA (incl. Switzerland) licence required. Original only — no photocopies or digital. Non-German/non-EU licences require certified translation or IDP. Non-EU licences accepted if no visa or <6 months EU residency. Ukrainian licences accepted (protection status until 03/2027). Min. age 18.
licence_rules.annotation_note: Well documented in main T&C. Ukrainian licence exception is time-limited (03/2027). Premium vehicles (GELY/WFLY/JELY/JELP): min. 5 prior Sixt rentals required.

payment_rules.ai_value: Credit and debit cards accepted: Visa, MasterCard, Amex, Diners Club, Discover, JCB, China UnionPay. Prepaid cards not a
payment_rules.ai_source_text: Sixt akzeptiert Kredit- und Debit-Karten sowie Digital Wallets von Visa, MasterCard, Ameri
payment_rules.expected_value: Visa, Mastercard, Amex, Diners Club, Discover, JCB, China UnionPay, Airplus, Amex BTA/iBTA accepted. Maestro/VPAY: vans and trucks + vehicles up to F*** only. Prepaid NOT accepted. Cash NOT accepted. Deposit: rental + €300 to €2,000 by vehicle group.
payment_rules.annotation_note: Cash NOT accepted in Germany (unlike Spain). EC-Karte not accepted for deposit (Germany-specific). Maestro/VPAY limited to vans/trucks and F*** or below.

cross_border_conditions.ai_value: 4-zone system. Zone I (Western Europe): all vehicles permitted. Zone IV (outside Zones I-III): prohibited for all vehicl
cross_border_conditions.ai_source_text: Die Fahrzeugwahl kann die Einreise in bestimmte Lnder beschrnken.
cross_border_conditions.expected_value: 4-zone system. Zone I: 22 countries (all vehicles). Zone II: Croatia, Czech Republic, Poland, Slovakia, Slovenia (excl. W***,X***,GVAR,UVAR,S&L). Zone III: Estonia, Hungary, Latvia, Lithuania (standard only). Zone IV: prohibited all vehicles. Leaving European continent prohibited (incl. Ceuta & Melilla). Penalty: €150. Abroad fee: €7.49/day.
cross_border_conditions.annotation_note: Fully documented in main T&C. Ferry transport within permitted zones is allowed. Abroad fee: €7.49/day or €29.75/week. XFLP/XFLY: €30/day.
